channel.title: Dotnettips.wordpress.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Dotnettips.wordpress.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Rock Your Code: I Let AI Build a Visual Studio Extension—Here’s What REALLY Happened
item.description: In March 2026, I challenged GitHub Copilot to build a Visual Studio extension, "Version Sync," from scratch without coding. Despite initial failures and needing extensive feedback, it succeeded in creating an extension to sync project version numbers. However, Copilot's code quality was lacking, emphasizing that AI can't replace experienced developers. Link to article: https://dotnettips.com/2026/05/03/rock-your-code-i-let-ai-build-a-visual-studio-extension-heres-what-really-happened/
